message:
style: Apply rustfmt formatting and fix cfg attribute placement

glow/src/lib.rs:
- Move #[cfg(feature = "syntax-highlighting")] attribute to guard the
  entire if block rather than just the inner statement
- Removes unnecessary nested block after cfg check
- Correctly compiles with and without syntax-highlighting feature

lipgloss/src/style.rs:
- Reformat long style_border_str() call sites to multi-line for readability
- Break ternary expressions across multiple lines for horizontal conditionals
- Adjust String::with_capacity() call formatting for consistency
- All changes are rustfmt-driven, no behavioral modifications

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
